clientData.description: Contains client-side data, like the device fingerprint, cookies, and specific browser settings.

customFields.description: Any custom fields used as part of the input to configured risk rules.

fraudOffset.description: An integer value that is added to the normal fraud score. The value can be either positive or negative.

profileReference.description: The risk profile to assign to this payment. When left empty, the merchant-level account's default risk profile will be applied.
